---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve LecturePack
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or crash output.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Log File

Please attach the contents of `~/LecturePackData/logs/app.log` (or paste the relevant section):

```
(paste log here)
```

## Environment

- **OS**: Windows [version]
- **GPU**: [e.g. AMD Radeon RX Vega 56]
- **Whisper Model**: [e.g. ggml-base.en.bin]
- **Whisper Backend**: [CPU / Vulkan / Auto]
- **LecturePack Version**: [e.g. 1.2.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. If the bug is related to a specific lecture video, note its format, duration, and resolution (do not share the video itself).
